sections.label: American Literature Course
sections.description: One American literature course from the English Department, chosen in consultation with the American Studies coordinating panel.

sections.label: AMS-100 Interdisciplinary Studies Colloquium (two terms)
sections.description: Two terms of AMS-100 Interdisciplinary Studies Colloquium.

sections.label: Five Additional Courses Focused on American Culture
sections.description: Five additional courses that focus on American culture, chosen in consultation with the American Studies coordinating panel. Constraints: (a) one course must be from the United States Pluralism group; (b) one course must be in economics (ECO), political science (POL), sociology (SOC), or teacher education (EDU); (c) two must be at the upper division level.

notes: ENG-127 is recommended in the student's first or second term at Coe.
